mapper.select: SELECT FROM pdp_project WHERE workspace_id=#{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND project_no=#{projectNo}

SELECT FROM pdp_project WHERE workspace_id=#{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND parent_project_id=#{parentProjectId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY project_no,id

WITH RECURSIVE ancestors(id,parent_project_id) AS (SELECT id,parent_project_id FROM pdp_project WHERE workspace_id=#{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND id=#{projectId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} UNION ALL SELECT p.id,p.parent_project_id FROM pdp_project p JOIN ancestors a ON p.id=a.parent_project_id WHERE p.workspace_id=#{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}) SELECT id FROM ancestors
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_project SET parent_project_id=#{parentProjectId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler},name=#{name},objective=#{objective},scope=#{scope},manager_id=#{managerId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler},priority=#{priority},health=#{health},top_lifecycle_state=#{lifecycleState},domain_stage_key=#{domainStageKey},status=#{status},revision=#{revision},updated_at=#{updatedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler} WHERE id=#{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision=#{revision}-1
